target: 2. Meeting Up with Mio
*Pant... pant...!*
*Pant...!*
(She should be around here. Mio, where are you...!?)
Shin-chan…?
developer_comments: 女の子の声（小舟澪（ミオ））

target: Shin-chan!!
Mio!
Thank goodness you're safe! Were you waiting here alone?
Yeah, you said we'd meet up at the shrine approach... so I've been waiting here the whole time...
But I'm really glad you're safe. How are things at the shrine grounds...?
Oh right, that thing from earlier! What the heck was that!?
So many... So many of the islanders...
(So Mio saw that sight too...)
Shin-chan... What's going on...?
I don't know…
But it's going to be okay. I'm with you from here on out.
Yeah...!
By the way, Mio…
Ask about Sou
Ask about Tokiko
You haven't seen Sou?
I met up with Sou-kun right away, and we escaped here together.
But it seemed like he was worried about Tokiko, since we got separated from her.
So I told him not to worry about me and to go look for Tokiko.
Toki-chan wasn't with you?
Tokiko was... I could hear her voice near me for a while, but...
While we were being swept away by the crowd, I lost track of where she went.
So I had Sou-kun, who was with me, go out to look for Tokiko.
…I see.
He should contact us once he meets up with Tokiko. Should we wait here until then?
What is this sensation...!?
Sh-Shin-chan! The shadow is closing in from the shrine grounds!
(It's spread this far already!?)
Anyway, we need to get away from the shrine! Mio, can you run?
Y-Yeah!
Alright! Let's go...!
*Pant, pant*... Mio, are you alright?
Yeah, I'm still fine. I've built up my stamina from swimming.
Are you okay yourself, Shin-chan?
Y-Yeah, I'm fine.
Hey... isn't something weird?
...Yeah, it's too quiet.
(It looks like the usual deserted street. But it's unnatural for it to be "as usual" on the day of the summer festival.)
Somebody help meee!
A Shadow! A Shadow is chasing me!
(Th-The Shadow has reached here...!?)
H-Help--
He disappeared...
Mio, run! It's dangerous here too!
O-Okay!
(Damn it... where is a safe place...!?)
*Pant, pant*...
Sh-Shin-chan, how far are we going?
(...How far do we need to go?)
(Is it even possible to escape from that Shadow in the first place?)
Hey, hey, let's calm down for a second, okay? It doesn't seem like there are any Shadows around here.
Ah, maybe they can't cross the river between the shrine and here!
It's a possibility...
(Otherwise, maybe there's a limit to how far the shadow can extend, or the number of people it can swallow.)
We haven't heard from Sou-kun. I wonder if he couldn't find Tokiko?
I'd like to meet up with them as soon as possible. Let's try contacting them from our end.
I'll call Sou, so Mio, you try calling Toki-chan.
Got it.
...He's not answering.
Same here...
(Are they in a situation where they can't answer even if they want to... Or, could it be...)
(N-No, what am I imagining!)
Shin-chan?
They might both be on the move. Let's try calling again later.
Yeah…
Hey, what are we going to do now? If that Shadow catches up to us again...
Let's see... The first solution that comes to mind is getting off the island.
Then, we go to the <color=#GF_TIPS_051>port</color> and take the ferry?
(There's a possibility that the residents who escaped from that Shadow are rushing to the port.)
(There are the tourists who came for the summer festival, and... the fans who came to Koyuba-san's live too. There are way more people than usual.)
Everyone on the island is probably thinking about escaping right now, so there's absolutely no way everyone can fit on the ferry.
You're right...
Should we leave the island, or should we hide...
I wonder which is better?
Alright, let's head back to Kofune for now. I'm worried about Alain too.
Right! Dad! Even if we run away, we have to bring Dad with us!
When we get back, we'll explain the situation to Alain, and think about what to do from there.
Shin-chan, let's hurry! I'm worried about Dad.
Should we try calling him right now?
Ah, good idea. I'll try calling him.
Is he not answering?
Y-Yeah...
Maybe he's cleaning up the shop or prepping for tomorrow, and didn't notice the phone.
Ah, I see.
Even though there's Kaori-chan's live at the festival this year, he said he had prep work to do and went back to the shop...
Even though he said it was to open the shop as usual tomorrow...
...What's going to happen from now on?
(Even I thought we could just welcome tomorrow like normal until just a little while ago.)
(I was naive. I let my guard down, thinking the Shadows wouldn't attack if there were a lot of people around...)
(And Koyuba-san too... was swallowed by the Shadow...)
(If I die, maybe I can loop and start over!)
(No, wait a minute. Even if a loop occurs, it doesn't mean I'll jump to the time I want.)
(The first time was on the ferry coming here, and the second time was at the port when Mio came to pick me up. There's a possibility that the next time will be after the festival has started.)
(Before that, can I even loop for sure? There might be trigger conditions I haven't noticed, and I might not be fulfilling them right now.)
(It's no good... I still have <color=#GF_TIPS_117>too little information</color> to risk my life.)
Shin-chan, are you okay? Your face is pale.
Ah, yeah... I'm fine. It's nothing.
(If I die and a loop doesn't happen, I won't be able to protect Mio anymore.)
(I was entrusted with Mio by Ushio. I can't do anything reckless.)
(I'll set the possibility of looping aside for now.)
(When there's truly nothing else I can do... The loop is the last resort I'll cling to.)
